description: Full-width landing page hero header with a responsive banner image, a heading, a description paragraph, and a scroll-down arrow button.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Hero header with banner image, title, and description

props.title: School of English
props.description: We are an interdisciplinary school, forming a community that truly brings together and sits at the interface of literature, language and linguistics.

stories.name: NoImage
stories.description: Hero header without banner image (nohead variant — lpheaderimg is omitted)

props.title: PD-AGE
props.description: International network for Parkinson's Disease modelling and AGEing. We are pioneering a global collaboration exploring the impact of ageing on Parkinson's disease.

stories.name: ShortDescription
stories.description: Hero header with a brief one-line description

props.title: Facilities
props.description: We're home to world-class facilities that support research both within the University of Sheffield and in collaboration with a wide variety of partners.

notes: The image block (.lpheaderimg) is absent when the parent page has the .nohead body class; model imageSrc as optional and conditionally render the .lpheaderimg div. The arrow button always has aria-label='Scroll to content' and class 'js-scroll-to'; the data-scrollto attribute defaults to '.region.region-breadcrumbs'. For simplicity the component renders only the fallback img tag, as the responsive sources are CMS-generated.
